title: persona-config
description: Copied to .claude/persona-config.json by setup-personas. The hook scripts read this at runtime via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}-relative scripts + a project-relative config path, so the plugin's hook scripts stay generic across every project.

testAndLintCommand.description: Single shell command the stop-gate runs; non-zero exit = BLOCK. e.g. 'npm test && npm run lint'

lintCommand.description: Formatter/linter invoked on a single changed file, e.g. 'npx eslint --fix'. The file path is appended as the last argument.

graphUpdateCommand.description: Code Review Graph's incremental-update command, taking a file path argument, e.g. 'npx code-review-graph update'

sourceGlobs.description: Shell glob patterns identifying source files worth graph-indexing. If empty, every edited file is passed to graphUpdateCommand.

protectedPaths.description: Shell glob patterns for paths requiring explicit human approval before Write/Edit, e.g. 'supabase/migrations/*', '*.lock', 'generated/*'

issueTracker.description: Human-readable note on the tracker chosen during ADAPT, e.g. 'GitHub issues labeled plan/<slug>; fetch with gh issue list --label plan/<slug>' or 'local files in docs/plans/<slug>/issues/'
